ifIgnored: The app will keep mixing queue, canvas, and interrupt behavior without a clear priority.
prompt: What should the first implementation optimize for?

options.description: Ship the review queue, focus view, structured answer flow, and resume semantics first.
options.label: Queue + focus

options.description: Start by checking activity and busy state before interrupting, even if the queue is still basic.
options.label: Presence routing

options.description: Start by making HTML dashboards, comparisons, and reports durable and findable before optimizing interruption.
options.label: Artifact memory

summary: Decide what the first implementation should optimize for before adding stronger channels or presence inputs.
title: Lock the chief-of-staff MVP loop
whyNow: The next refactor will either harden the unblock loop or drift into nicer artifact browsing without better interrupt-and-resume behavior.
